# MDE 1.4.15

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed code block syntax highlighting contrast across dark themes by selecting the Shiki theme from the current app theme family instead of always using the first loaded theme.
- Added contrast fallbacks for cached code block highlight decorations so existing blocks remain readable immediately after switching themes.
- Extended the theme visibility E2E coverage to assert highlighted code token contrast across every built-in colorway.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added a dedicated editor code highlighter adapter with unit and integration coverage.

## Documentation

- Updated the Chinese user manual code block section to note that syntax highlighting stays readable with the current theme.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npm run docs:build`
- `npm run build`

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP builds for Apple Silicon and Intel Macs.
- Windows NSIS installer and updater metadata.
